Macros for extracting and setting bit-fields in a container.

# Purpose
This C header file defines macros for manipulating bit-fields within a data container. The `JRT_EXTRACT_BIT_FIELD` macro extracts a bit-field from a specified container by shifting the container right by the least significant bit (`lsb`) and masking the result to the specified `width`. The `JRT_SET_BIT_FIELD_VALUE` macro sets a bit-field in a container by clearing the target bit-field area and inserting the new bit-field value at the specified `lsb` position. Both macros require the type of the container, the container itself, the position of the least significant bit, and the width of the bit-field as parameters. The file is protected against multiple inclusions with include guards.
